attributes.title: [MongoDB OTel] Operations
attributes.description: Traffic, latency, and operation breakdown for MongoDB.

This dashboard focuses on MongoDB traffic and latency:
- Operation rate by type (insert, query, update, delete, getmore, command)
- Operation time and average latency trends
- Global lock contention
- Network I/O (receive/transmit)
"}, "uiState": {}, "data": {"aggs": [], "searchSource": {"query": {"query": "", "language": "kuery"}, "filter": []}}}}}, {"panelIndex": "00496f85-b85b-96c2-a8a4-e352a023cd27", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 14, "w": 12, "h": 4, "i": "00496f85-b85b-96c2-a8a4-e352a023cd27"}, "type": "lens", "embeddableConfig": {"enhancements": {"dynamicActions": {"events": []}}, "hidePanelTitles": true, "attributes": {"title": "Operations/sec", "visualizationType": "lnsMetric", "type": "lens", "references": [], "state": {"visualization": {"layerId": "d0c7eb55-5f8e-53a9-23ef-2130002240b8", "layerType": "data", "metricAccessor": "d639dd66-6cef-932f-fd2b-acadd8469cd3", "showBar": false, "applyColorTo": "background"}, "query": {"esql": "TS metrics-mongodbreceiver.otel-default

| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "mongodbreceiver.otel"
| FORK (
    WHERE metrics.mongodb.operation.time IS NOT NULL
    | STATS op_time_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.mongodb.operation.time))
  )
  (
    WHERE metrics.mongodb.operation.count IS NOT NULL
    | STATS op_count_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.mongodb.operation.count))
  )
| STATS op_time_rate = SUM(op_time_rate), op_count_rate = SUM(op_count_rate)
| EVAL avg_latency_ms = CASE(op_count_rate > 0, op_time_rate / op_count_rate, 0)
"}, "filters": [], "datasourceStates": {"textBased": {"layers": {"71dd7add-a7ba-a312-4bab-9a3f47a41030": {"query": {"esql": "TS metrics-mongodbreceiver.otel-default
